name: Omega-3 Fish Oil 1200mg
description: Triple-strength, molecularly distilled fish oil for cardiovascular and cognitive support. Sourced from wild-caught anchovies and sardines.

faqs.question: Does this cause fishy burps?
faqs.answer: Our oil is molecularly distilled and lemon-flavored to minimize aftertaste. Taking it with food further reduces this.

faqs.question: Is this safe if I take blood thinners?
faqs.answer: High-dose omega-3 may interact with blood-thinning medications. Please consult your healthcare provider before use.

faqs.question: How should I store it?
faqs.answer: Store in a cool, dry place. Refrigerate after opening to maintain freshness.

name: Vitamin D3 + K2 5000IU
description: High-potency D3 paired with MK-7 form of K2 to support calcium absorption and direct it to bones — not arteries.

faqs.question: Is 5000IU too high for daily use?
faqs.answer: 5000IU is a commonly used therapeutic dose, but individual needs vary. If you're unsure about the right dose for you, consult your doctor — especially if you have kidney issues.

faqs.question: Why is K2 included?
faqs.answer: K2 activates proteins that direct calcium to bones and teeth rather than soft tissue. D3 and K2 work synergistically.

faqs.question: When is the best time to take it?
faqs.answer: Take with your largest meal of the day, as D3 is fat-soluble and absorbs better with dietary fat.

name: Daily Probiotic 50B CFU
description: Broad-spectrum probiotic with 10 clinically studied strains and 50 billion CFU per capsule. Shelf-stable — no refrigeration needed.
ingredients: Probiotic Blend 50B CFU (Lactobacillus acidophilus, L. plantarum, L. rhamnosus, L. casei, Bifidobacterium longum, B. breve, B. lactis, Streptococcus thermophilus, L. fermentum, L. salivarius)

faqs.question: Do I need to refrigerate this?
faqs.answer: No — our probiotic uses a shelf-stable delivery system. Store at room temperature, away from direct sunlight and moisture.

faqs.question: Can I take this with antibiotics?
faqs.answer: Yes, but take probiotics at least 2 hours apart from antibiotics to prevent the antibiotic from killing the probiotic strains.

faqs.question: How long until I notice a difference?
faqs.answer: Most customers notice digestive improvements within 1–3 weeks of consistent use.

name: Magnesium Glycinate 400mg
description: Highly bioavailable magnesium bound to glycine for superior absorption and minimal digestive side effects. Supports sleep, muscle recovery, and stress response.

faqs.question: Will this cause loose stools?
faqs.answer: Magnesium glycinate is the gentlest form — unlike oxide or citrate, it rarely causes digestive upset at recommended doses.

faqs.question: Can I take this with my blood pressure medication?
faqs.answer: Magnesium can interact with certain medications including blood pressure drugs and antibiotics. Please check with your doctor or pharmacist first.

faqs.question: When should I take it for sleep?
faqs.answer: Take 30–60 minutes before bed to support relaxation and sleep quality.

name: Collagen Peptides Powder 300g
description: Hydrolyzed Type I and III collagen peptides from grass-fed, pasture-raised bovine. Unflavored and dissolves completely — add to coffee, smoothies, or water.
ingredients: Hydrolyzed Bovine Collagen Peptides (Type I & III)

faqs.question: Does it dissolve in hot coffee?
faqs.answer: Yes — our peptides are heat-stable and dissolve completely in hot or cold liquids without clumping.

faqs.question: Is this suitable for vegetarians?
faqs.answer: No — this product is derived from bovine (beef) hide. It is not vegan or vegetarian.

faqs.question: How long does one bag last?
faqs.answer: At one scoop per day, each 300g bag provides 30 servings — about one month's supply.
